assertions: D10: Multi-turn chatbot conversation remains consistent, respecting same selected language.

vision_verdict: pass. The interface is displayed in a consistent English layout, maintaining complete linguistic uniformity throughout the UI elements, navigation menu, and instructional overlays. The platform provides a clear, high-fidelity user experience where the English setting is applied universally to all text components, including the sandbox welcome guide, sidebar labels, and library descriptions. The structural integrity is maintained with well-aligned components, ensuring that the selected display language remains stable and provides a reliable environment for the user to navigate the educational features.
